Metadata.Description: High-fidelity benchmark dataset for stiff ODE resolution, multiscale operator splitting, and multiclass traffic shockwave simulation.

Spatiotemporal_Discretization_Domain.Description: Eulerian FVM grid parameters rigorously satisfying the explicit Phase 1 CFL stability constraint.
Spatiotemporal_Discretization_Domain.CFL_Condition_Validation: Delta_t (0.5) <= Delta_x (20.0) / v_max (30.0) = 0.667. Mathematical explicit stability constraint is strictly satisfied.

Macroscopic_Capacity_and_Filter_Paramete.Description: Constants regulating effective spatial boundaries, regularizers, and continuous exponential relaxation filters.

Heterogeneous_Kinematic_Class_Profiles.Description: Nonlinear dimensional parameters distinguishing Class 1 (Passenger Car) and Class 2 (Heavy Duty Truck) transition dynamics.

Kinetic_Collision_Kernel_Matrix_Beta.Description: A 2x2 asymmetric matrix beta^{(m,n)} defining interaction probabilities. Rows correspond to the trailing class 'm'. Columns correspond to the downstream blocking class 'n'. Unit: meter^-1.
Kinetic_Collision_Kernel_Matrix_Beta.Physical_Significance: beta_1_2 (0.06) > beta_1_1 (0.03) dictates that passenger cars decelerate earlier when forward sightlines are physically occluded by heavy trucks.

Velocity_Spectrum_Edges.Lower_Bound: Force lambda_{1 -> 0} = 0.0 analytically at every integration step.
Velocity_Spectrum_Edges.Upper_Bound: Force lambda_{N -> N+1} = 0.0 analytically at every integration step.

Lateral_Topology_Edges.Inner_Bound: Force gamma_{1 -> 0} = 0.0 analytically at every integration step.
Lateral_Topology_Edges.Outer_Bound: Force gamma_{L -> L+1} = 0.0 analytically at every integration step.

Numerical_Validation_Scenario_Extreme_St.Description: A highly pathological initialization intended to validate the Phase 3 semi-implicit Thomas Algorithm's capacity to absorb infinite ODE stiffness without Newton-Raphson iterations.

Downstream_Bottleneck_Zone_Cells_75_to_8.Description: A near-capacity jam of Heavy Duty Trucks driving at minimum speed, mathematically creating a massive Singular Asymptotic Barrier B(Omega).
Downstream_Bottleneck_Zone_Cells_75_to_8.Condition: Omega (0.145) is extremely close to rho_max (0.150). The fractional Singular Barrier evaluates to exactly (0.150 / 0.005)^4.5 = 30.0^4.5 = 4,155,311.9, triggering extreme stiffness.

Upstream_High_Speed_Injection_Zone_Cells.Description: A dense platoon of Passenger Cars arriving at absolute maximum speed into the bottleneck.
Upstream_High_Speed_Injection_Zone_Cells.Condition: Expected to trigger severe mathematical stiffness and instantaneous kinematic thermalization upon entering cell 75 during explicit advection.
